ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED( Completion_Status__c ), ISBLANK( Dispute_Reason__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Completion_Status__c , 'Missing'), ISPICKVAL(Completion_Status__c , 'Defective') )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Dispute reason is required if completion status is Missing or Defective.
